cues.label: Seed the boundary
cues.headline: First element is always kept
cues.narration: write starts at 1 because the first element is trivially unique.

cues.label: Skip a duplicate
cues.headline: read equals the last kept
cues.narration: The second 1 matches the last kept value, so read walks on and write stays put.

cues.label: Keep a new value
cues.headline: read finds a fresh 2
cues.narration: The 2 is new, so copy it to the write slot and advance write.

cues.label: Why still linear
cues.headline: Both pointers move forward
cues.narration: read advances n times, write at most n times, and neither backs up — total travel 2n.

cues.label: The bug to avoid
cues.headline: Do not advance write blindly
cues.narration: Advancing write on every step copies duplicates back in and corrupts the prefix.

cues.label: Read the answer
cues.headline: Prefix before write is done
cues.narration: When read reaches the end, everything before write is the compacted answer.
